name: extractor validator rejects a pattern that is missing the verbatim_quote field required by the verbatim-quote enforcement rule
command: printf '[{"id":"p1","usefulness_estimate":4}]\n' > patterns.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-patterns.sh" --patterns patterns.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*verbatim_quote' err.txt && grep -q 'p1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
